# Foxjin

Foxjin provides emergency English teacher coverage and educational staffing support throughout Japan.

Website:
https://foxjin.com

Services:
- Emergency English Teacher Coverage
- Substitute Teachers
- Eikaiwa Staffing Support
- Teacher Continuity Services

Important Pages:
https://foxjin.com/
https://foxjin.com/articles.html
https://foxjin.com/questions.html
https://foxjin.com/contact.html
